subject: [PATCH 19/19] nfsd: initialize DRC hash table before registering shrinker

2026-06-09.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug on weakly-ordered architectures where the DRC hash table is not fully initialized before it becomes visible to the shrinker, causing a NULL dereference. The fix involves moving the initialization of the bucket list heads and the drc_hashsize store before registering the shrinker. This ensures that the hash table is fully initialized before it can be accessed by the shrinker.
